name: novaper
description: Novaper is an AI Windows desktop operator with live observation, replayable runs, and dual authentication.

scripts.electron:dev: npm run build:electron && cross-env ELECTRON=1 npm run --prefix apps/operator-web dev
scripts.electron:build: cross-env ELECTRON=1 npm run --prefix apps/operator-web build && npm run build:electron && electron-builder
scripts.electron:build:win: cross-env ELECTRON=1 npm run --prefix apps/operator-web build && npm run build:electron && electron-builder --win
